gems.name: AniWorld-Downloader
gems.description: AniWorld Downloader is a cross-platform tool for streaming and downloading content from AniWorld, SerienStream, MegaKino, and Hanime, with more support coming in the future. It runs on Windows, macOS, and Linux. If you enjoy using it, feel free to leave a ⭐!
